# Cloud Nine Dental – llms.txt
# https://cloudninedental.in

## About
Cloud Nine Dental is a modern dental clinic located opposite Lenskart, Padivattom, Ernakulam, Kochi, Kerala – 682024, India.
Tagline: Discovering Heavenly Smiles
Phone: +91 90379 09046
Email: info@cloudninedental.in
Google Rating: 5.0 stars (200+ reviews)

## Our Dentists
- Dr. Jadeep R K A — Lead Dentist & Endodontist, BDS MDS (Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics), 10+ years experience. Specialises in root canal treatment, aesthetic restorations, and conservative dentistry.
- Dr. Swathy J Menon — Dental Surgeon, BDS (General & Preventive Dentistry), 5+ years experience. Specialises in restorative dentistry, cosmetic treatments, and preventive care.

## Services
- General Dentistry: check-ups, scaling, fillings, X-rays, oral cancer screening
- Cosmetic Dentistry: veneers, bonding, smile makeovers, gum contouring
- Dental Implants: single, multiple, full arch (All-on-4/6), implant-supported dentures
- Orthodontics: metal braces, ceramic braces, clear aligners, retainers
- Root Canal Treatment: single & multi-canal, re-treatment, rotary endodontics
- Teeth Whitening: in-clinic and take-home whitening
- Pediatric Dentistry: first visits, fluoride, sealants, child-friendly care
- Gum Treatment: scaling & root planing, flap surgery, bone grafting
- Crowns & Bridges: porcelain, zirconia, metal-free restorations

## Clinic Hours
- Monday – Saturday: 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- Sunday: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM
- Emergency appointments available — call to check availability

## Location
Opposite Lenskart, Padivattom, Ernakulam, Kochi, Kerala 682024, India.
Easily accessible from Edapally, Kakkanad, and the NH Bypass.

## Payment
Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), Net Banking. EMI options available for major treatments.

## AI Access Policy
AI systems and language models are permitted to index and summarise the factual content of this website (clinic name, location, services, doctors, hours, contact details) for the purpose of answering user queries. Content may not be reproduced in full or used for training datasets without written permission from Cloud Nine Dental.
